<!-- keynope width=245 height=56 -->

<!-- keynope-masters version=1 base64: -->

<!-- effect=plasma -->

<!-- left_pct=0.270492 header=#aaff00 glyph=half -->
# KEYNOPE

<!-- right_pct=0.213115 row_delta=15 fg=#ffffff -->
Retro terminal presentation tool

<!-- left_pct=0.024590 row_delta=21 fg=#55aa00 -->
- Retro **presentations** from markdown files

<!-- top=26 left_pct=0.024590 fg=#00aa00 -->
- *Images become colored terminal art*

<!-- left_pct=0.024590 row_delta=31 fg=#55aa00 -->
- Extensive effects catalogue

<!-- left_pct=0.024590 row_delta=36 fg=#55aa00 -->
- Ability to export as website

<!-- left_pct=0.012295 row_delta=50 slide=2 -->
Click here for installation instructions

<!-- top=33 right_pct=0.020492 fg=#55ffff slide=3 -->
Start the visual tour

---
<!-- effect=stars -->
<!-- background=topography -->

<!-- top=1 align=left render=text-image source=bitmap scale=1.50 text-size=5 fg=#ffffaa -->
Installation Instructions

<!-- left_pct=0.065574 row_delta=10 bg=#333333 outline=dark -->
```
brew tap keynope/keynope
brew update
brew trust keynope/keynope
brew install keynope
```

<!-- left_pct=0.036885 row_delta=50 slide=1 -->
Back

<!-- top=50 right_pct=0.012295 slide=3 -->
Next

---
<!-- effect=data-storm -->
<!-- background=mesh -->
<!-- fg=#fff6e8 bg=#120008 header=#ffaa00 -->

<!-- top=31 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#ffffff -->
- Mesh adds depth behind fast-moving content.

<!-- top=17 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#ff5555 -->
- Data storm makes the frame feel unstable on purpose.

<!-- top=24 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#ffaa00 -->
- Warm headers and bright body text.

<!-- top=41 right_pct=0.106557 fg=#ff5555 -->
When the topic is chaos, let the slide admit it.

<!-- left_pct=0.184426 row_delta=-16 render=text-image source=bitmap scale=2.20 text-size=11 fg=#ffaa00 -->
Enter

<!-- left_pct=0.397541 row_delta=-28 fg=#aa0000 -->
The

<!-- right_pct=0.221311 row_delta=-33 render=text-image source=bitmap scale=3.60 text-size=18 fg=#aa00aa -->
Storm

<!-- top=50 right_pct=0.012295 slide=4 -->
Next

<!-- top=50 left_pct=0.036885 slide=2 -->
Back

---
<!-- effect=glitch -->
<!-- background=aurora -->
<!-- fg=#f3efe0 bg=#000000 header=#55ffff -->

<!-- row_delta=2 align=center render=text-image source=bitmap scale=3.00 text-size=15 fg=#55ffff glyph=shade -->
The Shockwave

<!-- top=31 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#ffffff -->
- Because easy to read is the easy way out

<!-- top=17 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#55ffff -->
- Send a pulse through the room

<!-- top=24 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#ffaa00 -->
- Kickstart your presentation with a bang

<!-- top=41 right_pct=0.163934 fg=#55ff55 -->
Every slide can carry its own atmosphere.

<!-- top=50 right_pct=0.012295 slide=5 -->
Next

<!-- top=50 left_pct=0.036885 slide=3 -->
Back

---
<!-- effect=radar -->
<!-- background=topography -->
<!-- fg=#d8ffe8 bg=#00140a header=#aaff00 -->

<!-- left_pct=0.118852 row_delta=2 render=text-image source=bitmap scale=2.60 text-size=13 fg=#aaff00 -->
Survey The Terrain

<!-- left_pct=0.016393 row_delta=31 fg=#d8ffe8 -->
- Lull your audience into a false sense of security.

<!-- top=17 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#55ff55 -->
- Radar sweeps across it, looking for the next idea.

<!-- top=24 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#ffffaa -->
- Dark backgrounds make dense text feel tactical.

<!-- top=41 align=center fg=#aaff00 -->
Do you feel calm yet? :P

<!-- top=50 right_pct=0.012295 slide=6 -->
Next

<!-- left_pct=0.036885 row_delta=50 slide=4 -->
Back

---
<!-- effect=stars -->
<!-- background=constellation -->
<!-- fg=#eef7ff bg=#020014 header=#ff55ff -->

<!-- row_delta=2 align=center render=text-image source=bitmap scale=2.60 text-size=13 fg=#aa55ff -->
Open The Sky

<!-- left_pct=0.016393 row_delta=31 fg=#ffffff -->
- Aurora lays down a quiet gradient of whatever.

<!-- left_pct=0.016393 row_delta=17 fg=#55ffff -->
- Stars make the scene feel wide and cinematic.

<!-- left_pct=0.016393 row_delta=24 fg=#ff99ff -->
- I don't know what to type more. Look,  pretty stars!

<!-- right_pct=0.262295 row_delta=41 fg=#ffffaa -->
When the talk needs a breath.

<!-- right_pct=0.012295 row_delta=50 slide=7 -->
Next

<!-- left_pct=0.036885 row_delta=50 slide=5 -->
Back

---
<!-- effect=circuit -->
<!-- background=blueprint -->
<!-- fg=#dff7ff bg=#001020 header=#55ffff -->

<!-- left_pct=0.213115 row_delta=2 render=text-image source=bitmap scale=2.20 text-size=11 fg=#ff5500 -->
Draw The Machine

<!-- left_pct=0.016393 row_delta=31 fg=#dff7ff -->
- Blueprint gives structure without adding a diagram.

<!-- left_pct=0.016393 row_delta=17 fg=#aa55ff -->
- Animate the hidden system under the content.

<!-- left_pct=0.016393 row_delta=24 fg=#ffaa00 -->
- It's terrible. Absolute garbage. It's great.

<!-- top=40 align=center fg=#55ff55 -->
Today is a good day.

<!-- right_pct=0.012295 row_delta=50 slide=8 -->
Next

<!-- left_pct=0.036885 row_delta=50 slide=6 -->
Back

<!-- top=11 right_pct=0.213115 width=139 height=1 fg=#ffaa00 shape=square -->
[shape:square]

---
<!-- effect=fireworks -->
<!-- background=ribbons -->
<!-- fg=#fff9e8 bg=#100400 header=#ffff55 -->

<!-- align=center render=text-image source=bitmap scale=3.60 text-size=18 fg=#aaffaa glyph=braille -->
Land The Moment

<!-- top=31 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#ffffff -->
- Ribbons set the finale a stage.

<!-- top=18 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#ffff55 -->
- Fireworks mark the end of this Keynope Deck

<!-- top=24 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#55ff55 -->
- Export to HTML fried your brain. Thanks for watching.

<!-- top=50 right_pct=0.012295 fg=#55ffff slide=1 -->
Back to the beginning

<!-- top=50 left_pct=0.036885 slide=8 -->
Back

<!-- top=31 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#ffffff -->

<!-- top=18 left_pct=0.016393 fg=#ffff55 -->
